video.subtitles:
WEBVTT

00:00:02.000 --> 00:00:04.210
Welcome to AI Quests

00:00:04.210 --> 00:00:07.000
My name is Professor Skye

00:00:07.000 --> 00:00:10.000
An AI expert and your mentor

00:00:10.000 --> 00:00:12.000
throughout this learning experience.

00:00:12.000 --> 00:00:14.080
We’ve been waiting for someone like you!

00:00:14.080 --> 00:00:18.000
You’re about to begin a journey through our world.

00:00:18.000 --> 00:00:21.040
As you travel, you’ll meet different inhabitants

00:00:21.040 --> 00:00:24.000
and learn about the challenges in their communities.

00:00:24.000 --> 00:00:27.000
Your mission is to help them by applying

00:00:27.000 --> 00:00:30.250
powerful AI responsibly to their problems.

00:00:30.250 --> 00:00:34.120
Each quest will teach you about a real-life AI research project

00:00:34.120 --> 00:00:38.000
that’s making an impact back on Earth.

00:00:38.000 --> 00:00:41.000
The AI technology you’ll experience is amazing!

00:00:41.000 --> 00:00:43.000
But it’s not magic

00:00:43.000 --> 00:00:46.000
success depends on the decisions you make.

00:00:46.000 --> 00:00:49.000
You’ll need to collect good data,

00:00:49.000 --> 00:00:52.000
train your AI to make smart choices,

00:00:52.000 --> 00:00:54.200
and test it to make sure it’s reliable.

00:00:54.200 --> 00:00:56.100
The universe is counting on you!

00:00:56.100 --> 00:00:58.000
Are you ready?
